name: 100% Whole Wheat Bread (Machine) - Large Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 1/8 tsp Yeast, fast rise or machine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water and yeast in the bread machine pan.
2. Add the flour, salt, butter, honey, gluten, and molasses to the pan.
3. Select the "whole wheat" cycle if available, or use a standard dough setting with an extra knead.
4. Close the lid and start the machine.
5. When the first knead is complete, let the machine rest for 10 minutes.
6. Reset the machine and resume baking on the same program.
7. Bake until the bread is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
8. Remove from the pan and allow to cool completely before slicing.
